mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNEMPLYRSCRTYESTBS (SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID, MBER_TY_CODE, AUTHOR_CODE) SELECT ESNTL_ID, 'USR01', 'ROLE_USER' FROM COMTNGNRLMBER WHERE MBER_ID = #{mberId} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE MBER_TY_CODE = VALUES(MBER_TY_CODE), AUTHOR_CODE = VALUES(AUTHOR_CODE)
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNGNRLMBER SET PASSWORD = #{password}, CHG_PWD_LAST_PNTTM = sysdate() WHERE MBER_ID = #{mberId}
